summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of cyberpunk-themed website transformation. All major features working correctly including dark theme, particle effects, navigation, modal functionality, and responsive design.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with dark cyberpunk theme (RGB 3,3,5 background)
Particle effects visible and working in hero section using tsParticles
Navigation links work correctly (About, Solutions, Why Us, Blog)
Smooth scrolling animations work with Lenis library
Mobile menu toggle functionality works properly
Booking modal opens/closes correctly with all trigger buttons
Modal closes when clicking outside or X button
Blog page loads correctly with dark theme
Blog post navigation works (clicking cards navigates to individual posts)
Blog post pages load with proper content and back navigation
Scroll reveal animations work (all 23 elements animate on scroll)
Footer links are visible and clickable (8 functional links found)
Social media links present in footer (3 links)
Glassmorphism effects applied correctly (backdrop-filter: blur(20px))
Gradient text effects working (webkit-background-clip: text)
3D tilt effects loaded (17 tilt elements found)
GSAP animations library loaded and working
VanillaTilt library loaded and working
CTA section particles working
Hover effects on cards and buttons working
Responsive design works (tablet: 768px, mobile: 390px)
Fast page load performance (311ms total, 295ms DOM ready)
No console errors detected during testing
